globalNews.title: Tens of thousands evacuated from French tourist spot and near Madrid as wildfires spread
globalNews.summary: The fire has raged in the region for several days with officials now ordering the evacuation of the entire Cap Ferret peninsula.

globalNews.title: US hits dozens of countries with new wave of tariffs
globalNews.summary: Imposed citing forced labour concerns, the levies replace a temporary global duty brought in after the US Supreme Court struck down tariffs in February.

globalNews.title: US and Iran trade more strikes in Gulf as fears of escalation mount
globalNews.summary: It comes as Iran condemned the US plan to use frozen Iranian assets to pay for war damages.

globalNews.title: Indonesian babies were trafficked to Singapore. What happens to them now?
globalNews.summary: At least 12 babies have been trafficked from Indonesia to Singapore, but what will happen to them remains unclear.

globalNews.title: South Africa's president wins bid to temporarily halt impeachment inquiry over 'Farmgate'
globalNews.summary: Ramaphosa has faced scrutiny following the theft of large sums of cash from his private farm in 2020.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin falls under $64K as surging US bond yields boost Fed rate-hike odds
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin saw several dips under the $64,000 mark as a Binance “plunge protection team” reemerged with bid liquidity to avoid a deeper BTC price rout.

cryptoNews.title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
cryptoNews.summary: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.

cryptoNews.title: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
cryptoNews.summary: Thailand’s SEC filed a criminal complaint against Bitkub and two former directors over alleged false disclosures linked to a 2021 cyberattack involving $50 million in assets.

cryptoNews.title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
cryptoNews.summary: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

cryptoNews.title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
cryptoNews.summary: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

aiNews.title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
aiNews.summary: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.

aiNews.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
aiNews.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

aiNews.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
aiNews.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

aiNews.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
aiNews.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

aiNews.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
aiNews.summary: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
Monthly jobs report - employment and wage data
